angle: Data-driven product leader with AI expertise, positioning to transform Nicobar's product strategy through analytics and personalization, while quickly learning the retail/fashion domain.
narrative: I am a product leader with a strong analytical foundation and a proven track record of launching and scaling products. At Emote, I co-founded and scaled an AI product to 450+ users, improving activation and retention through data-driven decisions. My background in statistics and machine learning enables me to uncover insights from customer data and drive product innovation. While I am new to the retail/fashion industry, my experience in building cross-functional teams and my passion for craftsmanship align with Nicobar's values. I am eager to apply my skills to Nicobar's product portfolio, leveraging analytics to identify gaps, optimize the customer journey, and drive growth in the Indian lifestyle market.
